content: All pipeline module functions (pollIssues, ingestIssue, dispatchRun, checkRunStatus, shipRun) accept an optional ExecFn parameter for subprocess injection, enabling unit tests without real CLI calls. defaultExec uses Bun.spawn.

Label mapping from GH labels to seeds fields: priority:P0-P4 -> 0-4, type:bug/feature/task -> seeds type, area:X -> '[X] ' description prefix, difficulty:X -> ' (X)' suffix. Unmapped labels preserved in description. biome.json for worktrees inside .overstory must use includes:['src/**'] not ['**'] to avoid excluding itself.
